title: LOUISIANA WATER CONTROL LAW
doc_html:
CHAPTER 4.  LOUISIANA WATER CONTROL LAW

§2071.  Citation

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Water Control Law."

Acts 1979, No. 449, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1980.
